programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la vida, las personas pueden vivir atormentadas por sus propios crímenes. Lo mismo también puede ocurrir en la muerte: espíritus enojados pueden quedar varados en el mismo lugar donde perdieron su humanidad.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la ciudad de Springfield, estado de Illinois, el Lake Club es un monumento a una época pasada: un salón de baile donde multitud de personas alguna vez prosperaron, acompañados de los sonidos del jazz clásico.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los sueños son vitales. Palpitan en nuestros corazones, resuenan en nuestras mentes, nos impulsan hacia adelante hasta que convertimos nuestra imaginación en acción y damos aliento a nuestros destinos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La fuerza de lo diabólico radica en el poder del engaño. De formas muy sutiles, destruye los lazos familiares y los de la amistad, desvirtúa las creencias de los creyentes y toma posesión de los vivos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En este mundo, la verdadera maldad existe. Acecha dentro de las sombras más oscuras, así como en los lugares más sencillos. Se disfraza con muchas máscaras para engañarnos y, finalmente, destruirnos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Se ha dicho que cada fotografía roba una parte del alma de un hombre. Entonces, ¿qué ocurre con todas esas partes cuando la persona ya ha fallecido?

programme.title: La vida secreta del diablo de Tasmania
programme.desc: Aunque a los demonios de Tasmania les gusta su parte justa de las peleas, también son padres comprometidos que son heroicos en la defensa de sus crías criadas en bolsas. Este episodio aborda las batallas de la temporada de apareamiento

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat
programme.desc: En las tierras altas, cerca de las montañas nevadas de Australia, se encuentra una gran área boscosa, conocida como Wombat Wood. Salpicadas entre el denso follaje están las aberturas visibles de más de 100 madrigueras donde duermen los wombats.

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat: La jornada de un joey
programme.desc: Los wombats suelen ser criaturas solitarias' y de movimiento lento', pero la cría de wombat es un momento de cambio, que genera energía, agresión y mucho juego.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Eche una nueva mirada a Nueva Caledonia. Experimente el estilo de vida local, visite una laguna increíble y encuentre paisajes asombrosos en cada esquina.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Israel ha sido una encrucijada para principales civilizaciones, religiones y corrientes comerciales y culturales que han nutrido los mundos europeo, árabe y asiático a lo largo del tiempo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: ¿Qué es un carioca? Los nativos son adorables bribones que encuentran formas de evitar el trabajo, prefiriendo la playa, coqueteando, frecuentando restaurantes y bares. Tony, bajo la tutela de un carioca ejemplar, prueba el estilo de vida.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Únete a Tony en su búsqueda del bar perfecto en Nueva York. Descubra la composición química correcta de las bebidas, las alegrías de los bares de mala muerte y la necesidad de aperitivos a altas horas de la noche.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Tour de un cocinero
programme.desc: Tony viaja a la capital del cinturón de cereales de Minneapolis, Minnesota, para experimentar de primera mano el conflicto entre los operadores creativos independientes y las franquicias genéricas.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Descubre el mítico archipiélago de las Cícladas del Sur. Visite la isla de Amorgos, donde se filmó la película de culto "The Big Blue", Santorini, que está cubierta de lava negra enfriada, y Naxos, la isla de Dionisio.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: La mayor parte de Laponia se encuentra en Noruega, y es en Karasjok donde los sámi tienen su propio parlamento. La identidad Sámi respeta las costumbres ancestrales y está en armonía con el medio ambiente.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Fred deceived his lover Jay, so now Jay wants his just desserts! Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda is about to drive his girlfriend away! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Not only does Michelle think Dwayne has a secret alias, but she also suspects he is possibly having an affair with her sister Tiffany. Then, Colleen is sick of his constant lies and wants to know if he has a secret life as "Big Daddy Russ!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 19-year-old Raven is a future bride in a few weeks, but suspects that Robert has been cheating. Then, Jeff fears his fiancée Kristen is having sex with someone else…his uncle JB!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The wedding is already planned, but Autumn caught Antoine cheating with her best friend of 10 years and suspects he may be detailing cars for sex. Then Ricky confessed to his fiancée Chelsea that he had sex with her step-mom Tecki, but is he lying?

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Anitra learns who her partner Kevin really is! Next James is weeks away from marrying Liz, but he has two big secrets to reveal. Then Elliot says he made the mistake of his life when he cheated on his boyfriend, Rob!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Sherry is furious with her ex-best friend Kim who seduced her son Nick. Then, Angie confronts her husband Dale's lover Bobbie who tries to come between them!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: A battle of brides on today’s Jerry Springer Show. Nicole issues an ultimatum to her lover: Dump her or lose me. Jerry watches as sparks fly on today’s show!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Pimp Hotlanta will set Nika straight about their relationship. Stephanie confronts her pal Erika for having sex with her man. Gloria was crushed when she found out that her sister stole her man.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Angelo está aquí para contarle a su novia que es mujer. Luego, Mikey ha traído a su novia para contarle que le ha sido infiel. Después, Jennifer siente que debe decirle a su amante la verdad sobre su sexualidad

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Nicole quiere recuperar a su novio, pero solamente si él termina su trío. Mesha ha estado enamorada del mejor amigo de su marido, Jamie, por cuatro años, pero no acepta un "No" como respuesta.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Mehren dice que todo estaría bien con su novio, John, si su esposa los dejara en paz. ¡Greg ha venido a decirle a su novia que le ha sido infiel con su mejor amiga, Yolanda!

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Greg le contará a su novia, Deidra, que trabaja en secreto como prostituto gay. El novio de Madrina sigue siendo infiel a ella con su ex. Después, Ro-Ro tiene dos novias y hoy la obligarán a elegir a una de ellas.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Cliff quiere que Anna, la mejor amiga de su novia, los deje en paz. Después, el marido de Kelly le ruega que lo acepte de regreso, pero Kelly no quiere porque ya está con el hermano de su marido.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Gail quiere más emociones en su vida, por lo que ha estado acostándose con el novio de su mejor amiga. Después, Dave se entera de que su novia de los últimos 3 años tiene una aventura y está dispuesto a todo para recuperarla, incluso ponerse un sostén.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, tenemos a madres y padres muy enfadados en negación. ¡Estos hombres juran que es imposible que sean los padres de los hijos de estas mujeres! Pero, ¿y si tienen razón? ¿Qué respuestas darán los resultados de ADN?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los invitados del episodio de hoy de MAURY tienen secretos que revelar, pero ¿se arrepentirán de contarlos? Hay relaciones en peligro. Puede que haya corazones rotos. ¿Podrán estas parejas sobrevivir a los secretos que amenazan con separarlos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, en MAURY, terminó la espera. Finalmente mostramos los resultados emocionantes de las pruebas de paternidad de ayer. Además, las nuevas parejas están cruzando los dedos para recibir las respuestas que quieren.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy, Marisol regresa por 12º vez para hacer la prueba de su 15º hombre. Luego, Dalyna vino a demostrar que Johnny Mack es el padre de su hijo. Él dice que es imposible porque le parece que el bebé es "demasiado feo" para ser suyo.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rhonda está segura de que John es el padre de su hijo. ¡Incluso la mamá de John está de acuerdo con ella! Después, Kim y Heather solían ser amigas, pero eso fue antes de que Rick la dejara por Heather. Sin embargo, Kim está segura de que Rick es el padre.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Hoy en MAURY, te pondremos al día con algunos de nuestros invitados más emocionantes. Los resultados de paternidad asombraron a todo el mundo. ¿Qué pasó después de revelar las respuestas y que estos invitados retomaron sus vidas?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Los huéspedes de MAURY han estado ocultando secretos horribles de sus seres queridos y eso les está desgarrando por dentro. ¡Están listos para confesar, incluso si eso les hace perder sus relaciones! ¿Se quedarán o se irán sus seres queridos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al sentirse rechazado una ves mas por la negativa de Rosaura, Patricio amenaza a su esposa con hacer su vida un infierno.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad interrumpe el momento de intimidad entre Luis Mario y Rosaura, para informar a su patrón que acerca el nacimiento de su hijo con Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Jimena deambula por las calles con el hijo de Eva, sin preocuparse del peligro que somete al pequeño niño, por debido a su alcoholismo. Guillermo se siente responsable por la situación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Guillermo recorren las adyacencias de la hacienda Arismendi, esperando encontrar el paradero de Jimena y su hijo. Eva recurre a su hábil engaño para evitar un enfrentamiento.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario es testigo del arrepentimiento de Jimena, al recibir de su parte el deseo de ser perdonada por su errónea actitud y la información acerca de su paradero.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada una ves mas con los enfermizo celos de Patricio quien al sospechar de su infidelidad la obliga a confesarle sus sentimientos y la amenza diciendole de nunca dejarla ser feliz.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se encuentra con la abuela de Rosaura, teniendo así la oportunidad de explicarle a Doña Cruz los sentimientos que alberga por la mujer que ama.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura visita el Spa para informar a Patricio sobre su determinación de abandonar la antigua casa de su abuela para hacer su vida lejos de él.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al sentirse rechazado una ves mas por la negativa de Rosaura, Patricio amenaza a su esposa con hacer su vida un infierno.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Verónica y Mariana hablan bajo la vigilancia de Doménica. Aun así puede contarle que está secuestrada y que no puede huir con Santiago. Arturo llega, la lleva a Doménica y la deja en manos de Lucho para que la cuide.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Lissette le confiesa a Mariana que el hijo de Gertrudis y Saladino es Martín, pero debe guardar el secreto, de otra manera ella estará en peligro y Martin puede cumplir con su amenaza de matar a su madre.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana le explica a Martín que solo puede quererlo como amigo, ya que ama a Willy. Margot y Willy tuvieron su primera noche de luna de miel, solo que Willie no deja de pensar en Mariana.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Margot y Willy tienen otra de su discusiones, pues ella insiste en que cobre su herencia. Panchita y Santiago oyen la discusión con preocupación.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Al haber revelado ante Eduarda su gran secreto acerca de su vinculación con Luis Mario, Mercedes toma la decisión de castigar a su hermana.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: Relive the thrills and excitement lasting from bell to bell and beyond as these fighters look to gain the ultimate prize.

programme.title: ONE Warrior Series
programme.desc: Rich Franklin puts his attention on OWS prospect Theo Christakos. Rich, Theo and his wife get out of the comforts of Sydney, Australia, to go canyoning at Wollemi National Park.

programme.title: ONE Warrior Series
programme.desc: Rich Franklin and his crew continue their search for the next ONE superstar in Auckland, New Zealand. They meet with OWS prospect Viet Anh Do, who grabbed their attention at the tryouts in Auckland MMA.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: ONE: Battleground III ended in a massive Muay Thai clash between the legendary Sitthichai and young star Tawanchai.

programme.title: ONE Warrior Series
programme.desc: Rich Franklin meets OWS contender Allan Albindo in Cebu, the Philippines. The team takes a 12-meter high cliff plunge at Kawasan Falls and participates in an annual grassroots program.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: These 3 fights from ONE: Nextgen were truly action-packed.

programme.title: ONE Vault
programme.desc: See how Ritu Phogat and Stamp Fairtex earned their place in the ONE Atomweight World Grand Prix Finals at ONE: NextGen.

programme.title: ONE Friday Fights
programme.desc: The weekend starts with ONE Friday Fights 41 as the world's largest martial arts organization brings another stacked card of Muay Thai and mixed martial arts to Bangkok.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The people of Dressrosa show their appreciation to the Straw Hats one last time by foiling Fujitora's strategy. As Luffy and the others are able to finally make their break from the island, however, an unbelievable new chapter opens in the story.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Countless souls have been lured along the Grand Line in pursuit of the legendary One Piece! Luffy D. Monkey is a young pirate with a dream: to prove the legend true and be king of them all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his new companion Coby set sail in search of the infamous pirate hunter Zoro, rumored to be held captive at the Marine Base.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy is in the line of fire after saving Zoro, and now tyrannical Captain Morgan is out for their heads! Zoro must decide if he will join forces with Luffy or die in captivity.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy recalls a time when Captain Red-Haired Shanks taught him a valuable lesson in friendship and set him on his quest to be King of the Pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy crosses paths with the clever thief Nami. A navigator on a quest to collect one hundred million berries, she’s perfect for Luffy’s new crew – except for the fact that Nami hates pirates.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Having delivered a deadly blow to Captain Buggy’s pirates, Luffy and his companions need a place to recuperate. But the three are not in hiding very long before the Beast Tamer Mohji seeks them out.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the ongoing fight with Captain Buggy’s pirates, Zoro must face off with the Acrobat Cabaji while Luffy continues to do battle with the Pirate Clown himself.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the gang are on the run after the battle with Captain Buggy! With no place to go and nothing else to do, Nami finally agrees to join Luffy on his quest.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Zoro, and Nami arrive at an island hoping to obtain a ship and crew, but the three are quickly confronted with the blustering Captain Usopp – who has a connection to Luffy’s past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy follows Usopp to the mansion and encounters the brutal pirate Captain Kuro. The scoundrel plans to claim Kaya’s fortune and live the stolen life of luxury.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp spreads the word of Kuro’s evil plot and the impending pirate attack, but no one believes his warnings. The Straw Hat Pirates decide to help Usopp put a stop to the dastardly scheme.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and crew seek to best Captain Kuro, but they’ve prepared their defense on the wrong side of the island! All looks grim now that Usopp must face off against the Black Cat Pirates alone.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In an effort to save Usopp’s village, the Straw Hat Pirates seek to block the marauders’ path from the sea. With Luffy out of the battle, Zoro must face the fearsome Meowban Brothers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami manages to rescue Zoro’s missing swords and attempts to revive Luffy. With one of the Meowban brothers down, the other rages on even more fiercely than before!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp’s friends run away with the heiress Kaya. Jango races off after them, but not before sending Butchie into a berserk rage. As Zoro continues his battle, Luffy takes on Captain Kuro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles with Kuro on the beach, while the Veggies (with Kaya in tow) flee Jango the Hypnotist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kaya rewards the Straw Hat Pirates’ efforts to save her with a ship to call their own – the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: On the legendary Treasure Island, Luffy and crew encounter strange animals and an even stranger man named Gaimon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the past, young Zoro sparred constantly with a girl named Kuina, but he could never claim victory. They vowed that one of them would someday be the world’s greatest swordsman – but tragedy intervened.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats need a cook among their crew, so they head to a nearby restaurant and meet a passionate Sous Chef named Sanji.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy witnesses the fighting prowess and compassionate nature of the Sous Chef Sanji. The good news: The Going Merry’s found a cook! The bad news: He has no intention of joining the crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The staff and patrons of the Baratie panic when Don Krieg arrives! The starving pirate begs for nourishment, only to find himself denied. Unable to see a wretch starve, Sanji steps in once again.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Krieg promises further malice as he returns to his ship, but the threat to the Baratie proves short-lived as an even bigger threat arrives!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Going Merry’s been stolen by Nami, and the showdown for possession of the Baratie is delayed. But the action’s not dead in the water – Zoro challenges Hawk-Eye Mihawk to a duel!

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Visions
programme.desc: Johnny sets out to discover the secret of a mysterious man (Frank Whaley) who appears to be stalking him but actually has a life-changing message for Johnny.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 1
programme.desc: Johnny becomes the prime suspect in a case involving a missing woman and is confronted by her sister (Sarah Wynter), who clamors for his arrest.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: The Ghostbeaters are put to the ultimate test to defeat a global demon infestation whose epicenter is Elk Grove. Ash, Pablo, Kelly and Brandy gear up for battle one last time to save the world!

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Special Agent Fisher is tracking Ash. Pablo gets his first taste of blood in a manic battle, and a revelation changes Kelly's life forever.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly reach Books from Beyond with the Necronomicon and Fisher finds herself in another terrifying, inexplicable situation.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ruby helps Fisher and reveals her family's connection to the Evil Dead. Ash and team follow a clue from the demon Eligos, but Kelly pays a price.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Kelly's current state puts others in jeopardy. This forces Pablo to make a brave move and Ash to reveal a new side to his character. Ruby and Fisher join forces in pursuit of Ash.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Pablo and Kelly notice something ominous between the Book and Brujo's pendant. Ash promises to visit Lem, but Fisher shows up for an almighty showdown with her former boss.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash, Pablo and Kelly, now joined by Fisher, arrive at the survivalist camp in the midst of chaos and must go to extreme measures to escape. Meanwhile, more is revealed of Ruby's mission.

programme.title: Ash vs Evil Dead
programme.desc: Ash attempts to bury the book to end the Evil, but first he must contend with other, more physical things from his past. Fisher faces a horrific change in Ash.

programme.title: NightMan
programme.desc: Night Man meets a former KGB assassin and senses a worse future for her.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Magnus and the team go to a bank to retrieve an Abnormal that was stashed in a safe deposit box, which not only hatched prematurely but also escaped, prompting Kate to enforce a less-than-subtle quarantine of the bank's customers.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Nikola Tesla sends a distress call to the team, and they track him to the Colombian highlands, where they encounter deadly multipedes. Meanwhile, Bigfoot and Kate learn that a long-time friend has been murdered in Old City.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Kate gains superpowers when an Abnormal adheres itself to her after gunmen breach the Sanctuary in a bid to steal the creature.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: A werewolf sighting brings Will and Henry to England, where they learn of suspicious happenings at a psychiatric facility. Meanwhile, Magnus and Tesla work together to probe the mysteries of the holographic city.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Finding Rachel - Part 2
programme.desc: Following his arrest for the murder of a young volunteer for the Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery) campaign, Johnny struggles to persuade the victim's sister (Sarah Wynter) to help him find the real killer.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Journalist Maggie Freleng searches for answers in the 2004 disappearance of a nursing student following a car crash in New Hampshire.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Horseplay

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Where's the Fire?

programme.title: American Pickers

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: Rome deals with conflict at home. At Pompeii and Fidenae we discover the clues to the huge wealth that flooded the Republic – but divided society. We meet the unlikely champion of the people who brought an end to this rampant inequality.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: The story of the greatest Roman of them all - Julius Caesar. His own memoirs guide us through his journey from bankrupt civil servant to invincible general.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: We explore the legend of Romulus and Remus and search for hard evidence of a prehistoric settlement on the Tiber. In Rome’s ancient sewers, we uncover how the first leader turned their city into stone.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: Rome’s aggressive expansion takes it toe-to-toe with another great power – Carthage. An ancient town in Tunisia brings this civilization to life. Archaeology on the sea bed off Sicily reveals the brutal naval war between the two powers.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: Rome deals with conflict at home. At Pompeii and Fidenae we discover the clues to the huge wealth that flooded the Republic – but divided society. We meet the unlikely champion of the people who brought an end to this rampant inequality.

programme.title: Rome: World's First Superpower
programme.desc: The story of the greatest Roman of them all - Julius Caesar. His own memoirs guide us through his journey from bankrupt civil servant to invincible general.

programme.title: Roman Megastructures
programme.desc: Today, Lyon is the third-largest city in France but during ancient times, it was the largest. At the time, the capital of the Gauls was called Lugdunum.

programme.title: Roman Megastructures
programme.desc: The monuments of Arles are World Heritage Sites and the town's Roman past is visible throughout. Here, for the first time, is the architectural odyssey of the most elegant Gallo-Roman city in History.

programme.title: Roman Megastructures
programme.desc: Using 3D imagery, reconstitutions and interviews with historians and archaeologists, this documentary will tell the story of Gallo-Roman Paris and uncover the vestiges of ancient Paris: Lutetia.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: The period of canal building gave rise to the emerging discipline of civil engineering. In the late 18th century people viewed engineers as soldiers; engineering then was dominated by the military.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: Carving up our landscape in order to build canals in the late 1700s helped pave the way for a far deeper understanding of what existed below our feet. The period was significant in the development of the new science of geology.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: During the 'Golden Age' of canals, capitalism was changing rapidly, moving us ever closer to the financial and economic systems we are familiar with today.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: This is the story of the men who built our canals ‚'the navigators' or ‚'navvies'. Their story is often overlooked or misunderstood. They represented an ‚'army'‚ of hard physical men who were capable of enduring tough labour for long hours.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: Once the canals were built - men, women and children toiled for long hours, often in dangerous conditions; and at huge personal cost.

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: In this final episode, we look at the modern history of canals and the changes that took place after WW2. They were no longer places of smoke, toil and industry, or places for 'fast' transportation. What was to be done with our canals?

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: One man moves his family to a trailer where they share their space with more than 200 snakes. Another man continues to milk deadly snakes on a daily basis, despite developing a life-threatening allergy to venom.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un policía juega al portero cuando atrapa a un ladrón corriendo hacia él. Víctimas de ladrones armados describen con detalle el crimen que se grabó. Oficiales hacen entrega de unos niños llorando a su madre.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un sospechoso escapa y provoca que los agentes lo persigan por un arroyo. Un adolescente intenta ayudar a una mujer y termina envuelto en una extraña pelea doméstica. Después de destruir su propia casa, una mujer ruega que la arresten.

programme.title: ¡Alto! Frontera

programme.title: Emergencias bizarras

programme.title: Rescate aéreo

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 sends a probe through the Stargate, a powerful electronic impulse comes back through and hides inside SGC's computer. But when the entity suddenly jumps inside Carter's mind, SG-1 must choose between saving SGC and saving Carter's life!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a tricky situation when they join forces with androids designed to look like them in a battle against an evil Goa'uld System Lord. Can they fight alongside robotic doppelgangers, or will confusion and contradiction blur the line?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 joins forces with the Tok'ra in a final attempt to rid the universe of their mutual Goa'uld nemesis, Apophis. But their plan goes awry when a member of the team is captured and they find themselves at the mercy of their most feared enemy!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Presumed dead, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) is discovered very much alive…but still under the control of the evil Apophis (Peter Williams). Will the SG-1 team be able to rescue their friend from the clutches of Apophis or will they die trying?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: While Teal’c’s body has been saved from death on Apophis’ ship, his mind is still loyal to his Goa’uld lord. Jaffa Master Bra’tac suggests an ancient ritual to restore Teal'c's mind...a ritual fraught with danger and one which no one has survived.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and McKay set out, along with two scientists, to explore when they stumble upon a distress beacon coming from a Wraith ship. When they move to investigate, they discover that the ship has been sending out it's SOS signal for 10,000 years.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: A team of scientists are surveying the city for damage after the storm when they unknowingly release a virus causing hallucinations and death. The virus infects McKay, Zelenka, and Ford leaving Sheppard to stop it from spreading further.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While searching a new planet, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find a paradise world, Proculus, that would make an ideal sanctuary for those fleeing from the Wraith. The local inhabitants, however, believe their goddess will not permit it.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: During an exploration of the city, Sheppard (Joe Flanigan) and the team find an old woman in suspended animation. Thinking her to be an Ancient, the team wakes her up, only to discover that it is Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson).

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team searches for a valuable Zero Point Module rumored to be hidden on the planet Dagan, where the Sudarians were trusted with the module over 10,000 years ago. In their search the team begin to worry about their new allies, and their motives

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: With a group of Wraith hive ships on the way to Atlantis, the team searches for a place to flee and a way to destroy the city. McKay (David Hewlett) leads a team to try and activate the Ancients' orbital weapons platform to destroy the Wraith.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo les explican a los Reyes que se quedan en la hacienda ante el peligro que se cierne sobre Gabriela. Fernando contrata como mayordomos a dos antiguos enemigos de los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Leonidas vuelve a ofender a Ruth y Juan la defiende, pero Óscar impide que su hermano lo golpee porque es el médico que atendió a Jimena, Leonidas pide perdón, Eva encara a Raquel sobre Ruth.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo desconfían de Malcolm y Carmela, los nuevos empleados de Fernando, porque eran los antiguos mayordomos de Eduvina. Martín defiende a Dominga de las arbitrariedades de Carmela.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín insulta a Carmela, ella y Malcolm se dan cuenta de que el abuelo es un obstáculo en su camino, Norma trata de abrirle los ojos a Gabriela. Rosario visita la hacienda y se pelea con Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Un nuevo pistolero intenta asesinar a Juan, Óscar reconoce el carro y lo siguen hasta la hacienda de Gabriela, donde se produce un enfrentamiento, Fernando encubre al autor de los ataques.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hombres armados custodian la hacienda de los Reyes día y noche. Carmela sigue su plan y finge un desmayo para que despidan a Dominga, por quien surge una guerra entre Martín y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: A pesar de la vigilancia, Dínora entra en la hacienda de los Reyes y le dispara a Juan, quien la denuncia. Dominga comienza a trabajar con los Reyes, se avecinan nuevos problemas amorosos.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le regresa el niño a Lucecita. Alejandro va a la tumba de Gabriela y Verónica lo escucha decir cuánto todavía la extraña y la ama. Ella siente nostalgia. Antonia está tensa y ordena la muerte de Julio, que ya sabe que Gabriela está viva.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Julio repite el nombre de Gabriela Suárez mientras agoniza, pero no alcanza a decir que ella es Verónica Dantés. Antonia se va quedando cada vez más sola y Poncia se lo hace notar. Alejandro sabe que su mamá no siente nada por la muerte de Montemar.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica no quiere que Alejandro se vaya del pueblo. Él aprovecha la oportunidad para repetirle que la ama. En una misión especial a San Pedro, el comisionado Balmaceda tiene su primer enfrentamiento con Antonia. Ricardo trata su problema de impotencia.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Antonia es sacada de su hacienda esposada; Balmaceda es obligado a llevársela cargándola. Verónica le da pistas al comisionado acerca de Guerra. Lucho teme que el mismo policía que lo llevó a prisión descubra todo. David es sorprendido con su novia.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers leave no stone unturned while looking for a clue in Thessaloniki, Greece.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After traveling to seven countries and 17 cities, one team will be crowned the winner.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven of the most memorable teams return for another Race around the world, but in a dramatic series first, one team will not make it to the starting line.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Mark and Mallory continue to struggle with communication and one major mistake jeopardizes their chances to keep racing.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through the Malaysian jungle where the roaring rapids crush their spirits and their homemade rafts. Plus, after being struck by taxi deja vu, one team fights to stay in the running.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: One racer pours blood and tears into an exhausting Roadblock and another racer suffers a meltdown during an extremely difficult Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race continues in Sri Lanka where teams struggle to get a bite when fishing for their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The teams are in Sri Lanka, where an exhausting Roadblock drains the racers of all their strength. Also, an epic race through the countryside ends with a footrace to the Pit Stop.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race to Rome, Italy, where Racers and Roman gladiators square off in a medieval Detour. Plus, three teams strike a deal in order to try to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The competition gets fierce as the remaining six teams face a double U-Turn, and the Cowboys contemplate a major decision.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the final finish line getting closer, tension between two teams rises. Meanwhile, three teams make a final three alliance in hopes of making it to the final leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Racers are in Spain where another double U-turn threatens the accidental alliance. Meanwhile, one team suffers a potentially game-changing injury.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams are in Liverpool, England, where they experience a once-in-a-lifetime shoot-out at the historic Anfield Stadium, home of the Liverpool FC.

programme.desc: When Aunt Bee snags the starring role in the Mayberry Centennial Pageant, Andy and Opie become neglected at home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie's an unwilling participant when he's betrothed to marry a mountain family's daughter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Helen are supposed to have a day off but are continually interrupted at their secluded picnic spot by Barney Fife asking questions about his duties.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife demonstrates gypsy fortune telling to Opie and then Opie's wishes seem to begin to come true.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife decides to dabble in real estate as a side job. He tries to get the sheriff to put his house up for sale.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Goober dismantles a car in the sheriff's office.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Otis (Hal Smith) rides into Mayberry on a cow under the impression it is a horse.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife believes he's hexed when several accidents happen after he fails to continue a lucky chain letter.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney think they'll have some privacy with their girlfriends after Goober finds a girl of his own. But they discover Goober favors triple dates.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney runs for sheriff when Andy seems lined up for another job. Andy's job falls through and he becomes a write-in candidate for re-election.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney finds $250,000 in cash from a bank robbery and decides to capture the robber himself.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's reputation brings a proposal from a Hollywood writer that he star in a television series as a sheriff without a gun.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy's girlfriend becomes jealous when a pretty friend of the family stays at the Taylor home.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney divides Mayberry into two hostile camps when he finds that an old assault case was never resolved.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie becomes a newspaper publisher and proceeds to put out a scandal sheet and distributes free samples.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee invents a beau. When she's pressed for a name she names the butter and egg man who is married.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Comedian Don Rickles guest stars as Newton Monroe, an itinerant peddler who seems unable to do anything right.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Palm trees sway in the warm breeze as Bob Ross teaches us to paint a beautiful, sunny exotic little ocean masterpiece.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a walk with Bob Ross today, over a sweet old footbridge, across a little creek a'splashin' through the woodlands.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs a unique technique, using both black and white basecoats, to create a happy little stream tumbling down a rocky meadow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: The mountains and the sky sing in harmony as Bob Ross's brushes tell a story of breathtaking hue and depth.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Winter scenes don't have to be cold! With a touch of the sun's warmth, Bob Ross turns the chill of winter into a golden day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A weathered fence guards a rustic country home shadowed by tall trees as Bob Ross creates another masterpiece in his unique style.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Guest painter Steve Ross uses lots of color in this stirring depiction of giant peaks behind foothills opening onto a smooth lake.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates soft purple sky and tall trees that almost seem to float in the hazy foothills of a distant, blue-grey mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Drink in the breathtaking beauty of spectacular cascades deep in the timberland. Bob Ross invites you create this astonishing scenic display.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Grandest of mountains overlooking an incredibly breathtaking waterfall … a Bob Ross painting you must see to believe!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a stroll with Bob Ross deep into the swamp and breathe in the fragrances of damp earth and moss-filled trees on a rill bank.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a hike with Bob Ross to the southwestern region, see the beauty of fresh skies over sun-glistened mountains and silvery mere.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross and experience the magic of early morning in an oval, as gentle trickles and splashes of a happy stream pierce the silence.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a beautiful lake in high country -- catch a glimpse of magnificent mountains, images echoed in the crystal clear water below.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Old-time memories are conjured up by the sight of this lonesome big barn that Bob Ross places on the edge of a forest.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross' gentle brush strokes create bending palm trees on the edge of a sea coast, just before the water reaches its high point.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Take a nice walk with Bob Ross along a peacefully flowing river and enjoy a view of gorgeous amethyst mountains and stately trees in the distance.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Join Bob Ross for a happy half-hour as he creates one of his beautiful mountain and evergreen scenes, complete with path and ample bushes.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross creates a beautiful golden warm waterfall scene, employing a lovely almost watercolor-looking effect. Come join in the fun!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints a golden field of sparse pines and other greenery inside the unique shape of a tapered rectangle with cut-in corners.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Today Bob Ross creates a fantastic southwestern mountain scene with spectacular red peaks looming over a lazy, tree-lined stream.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Majestic snow-covered peaks and evergreens loom over lush green grasslands as Bob Ross takes you into his world of natural beauty.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this one-of-a-kind masterpiece, Bob Ross paints a vibrant golden-red glow, complete with cowboy restin' a while by the cracklin' flames.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Imagine stumbling upon this little surprise cabin and shed, nestled in the snow drifts! Bob Ross shows you how easy it is to paint.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Relish the tranquility of valley waters gently falling into a quiet summer mere - smooth cliffs and trees frame this Bob Ross wonderland.

programme.title: The Bob Ross Experience
programme.desc: Witness the incredible transformation of Bob Ross's original studio into an intimate museum experience designed for those he inspired.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The players face off in a slippery Pole Dance challenge, two guys compete in a brutal round of Pole Wrestle in The Duel, and a competitor has a breakdown.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: One person makes closed-minded comments about a competitor's identity, the players endure an eating contest and race during Dine-n-Dash, and two women face off in the Ascender duel.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The men and women partner up in the Stacking Stairs challenge, two friends compete in the Pole Wrestle duel, and a player moves in for a highly anticipated first kiss.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The players go head-to-head in the Ice Breakers challenge, and one competitor is determined to step up her game as two women put their strength to the test in the Push Me duel.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The men and women team up for the difficult Sunken Treasure challenge, two guys go at it in the Ascender duel, and one player feels used by another competitor.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors must collect flags as they circle a 40-foot truss in the Around the Block challenge, a player goes back on her word, and two women head to The Duel to play I Can.

programme.title: The Challenge
programme.desc: The remaining players compete in Paddle Me, which guarantees two people a spot in the finals, and a double duel night of Push Me and I Can determines the other two contenders left standing.

programme.title: The Challenge

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: At Hwange National Park in Zimbabwe, Jack heads out on a Lion-tracking expedition learning the dynamic social structure of these amazing Big Cats! And, Jack hits the trail looking for one of the most rare and endangered species in Africa.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Galapagos Islands. He meets giant tortoises, land iguanas, sea turtles and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack for a countdown dedicated to the largest members of the great ape family… gorillas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to Pigeon Forge, Tennessee for an All-American Bald Eagle adventure with the American Eagle Foundation at Dollywood!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: See a pattern on this Wild Countdown? Whether it’s for camouflage or advertising deadly venom, every creature on today’s countdown is sporting stripes. Tigers, zebras, sea snakes, ring-tailed lemurs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: It's all Relative
programme.desc: Prepare to be shocked and amazed, because today Jack is exploring the family trees of six wild animals! Believe it or not rlephants are related to manatees, the same is true for rhinos and tapirs, giraffe and okapi and more surprising animal relatives.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: On Vancouver Island, in British Columbia, Jack and his daughter Kathaleen experience Canada from above and below the water.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Greatest Apes
programme.desc: There are more than 200 different kinds of primates in the world today, but did you know only five are members of the exclusive club of great apes? Come along with Jack as he counts down his greatest great ape encounters!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Take a trip with Jack and the Hanna family to Bruny Island in Tasmania. See an all-white wallaby, watch wild fur seals at play and go on a thrilling boat ride on the Tasman Sea that ends with a surprise dolphin encounter.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Hospitals
programme.desc: Jack visits the doctors and hospitals that care for creatures big and small – from Silverback Gorillas and lightning-quick cheetahs to pet pigs and rescued possums. Today, see some of the world’s outstanding animal hospitals in action!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a journey down south to Florida's Everglades where he meets gators, snakes, and other creatures from the swamp.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack discovers Costa Rica's Tortuguero National Park. He has a once-in-a-lifetime encounter with a wild Jaguar and meets Toucans, Monkeys, and Caimans all before checking out life in the remote village.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is back at the barnyard with six of his favorite farm animal friends, like pot-bellied pigs, horses, cows, and even camels!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: South Africa is the place for seeing the biggest and most recognizable animals in all of Africa. So today, Jack is heading straight to the famous Shamwari Game Reserve for up-close encounters with elephants, rhinos, lions, and the rest of the Big Five!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an adventure to the Loggerhead Marinelife Center in Juno Beach, Florida where conservationists are working to save endangered sea turtles.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he searches for the greatest ape species, like Gorillas, Orangutans, Chimpanzees, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as heads to the frontlines of wildlife conservation and meets the warriors working to save endangered species. Elephants, Rhinos, Bongo, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Everybody loves baby animals – especially Jack and Sue! Check out some unpredictable moments from undeniably cute babies like wombats, koalas, elephants -- and even a black rhino named after you know who.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes of animal care with Jack to a special turtle hospital in Marathon, Fla. See what it takes to rehabilitate the reptiles and watch a release back Into the Wild! Then Jack visits the Dolphin Research Center.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: An old Air Force radar station converted into a small lodge provides Jack with a perfect platform for bird watching in Panama's Sobering National Park. Among the many tropical birds Jack spots from high atop Canopy Tower is the beautiful Blue Cotinga.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack explores the red island known as Rabida in Ecuador's Galapagos Islands. See Darwin Finches, Sea Lions, Pelicans and loads of other creatures living on the enchanting island!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dangerously Cute
programme.desc: When it comes to wildlife, sometimes danger wears a disguise. Today, Jungle Jack is looking at the dark side of six deceptively darling animals, from the poison dart frog and duck-billed platypus to the hippopotamus. Find out which creature is number one.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Peru is brimming with unique wildlife, come along as Jungle Jack takes the adventure of a lifetime down the mighty Amazon! From Tapir and Sloth to Pink River Dolphins and Giant River Otters, this is a journey you won't want to miss!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Big Green Eating Machines
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a massive countdown filled with the planet’s most voracious vegetarians like elephants, hippos, rhinos and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: This adventure has Jungle Jack written all over it! Join in as we head deep into the Peruvian Amazon Rainforest get a rare look at Giant River Otters, Pre-Historic Birds, Caimans and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack as he heads to the Umfolozi Big 5 Game Reserve in South Africa for amazing animal encounters.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Misunderstood Animals
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is going to reveal the truth about some of the animal kingdom’s most misunderstood creatures, like sharks, stingrays, wolves, gators and more!

programme.desc: A college professor (Dick Martin) turns the Love Boat into a laboratory to test the romantic responses of his lovely female student (Char Fontane).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Romance and comic intrigue reign on the high seas as 25 engaged couples board the Pacific Princess to compete in a "Marriage-A-Thon Cruise." (Part 1)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Darren McGavin, as dynamic promoter Larry Evans, recruits the services of "The Love Boat" to take the brides-and-grooms-to-be, who are competing for a house, a car, and $50,000 in cash, on a cruise that will wind up in a mass wedding in Acapulco. (Part 2)

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Julie is accused by a woman (Lani O'Grady) of stealing her fiance (Bart Braverman).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac causes comedic chaos when he convinces the crew to bolster his stagestruck aunt's (Isabel Sanford) ego, which turns her into an outrageous prima donna.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing gets trapped in a love triangle by his old girlfriend (Sue Ann Langdon), now married to the ship's former captain (Mont model (Pamela Sue Martin) attempts to insure her privacy

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is the subtlest form of death, and investigators must see through unusual circumstances to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Lies and deceit can often throw investigators off the trail of justice. But when hard evidence contradicts a killer's story, police must use the clues to piece together the truth.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For some killers, murder can be a profitable business. And the scene of the crime can be both a source for clues, and puzzling questions. When a victim has been targeted for death, investigators must look beyond the obvious to uncover a murder for hire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poisoners are the most devious of killers, relying on stealth or their victim's trust in order to steal their lives. They're the most dangerous creatures in the world: smart assassins. And they usually don't stop at one kill.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hairs and Fibers: The tiniest filament can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways. Investigators have come to rely on forensic evidence as fine as a carpet fiber or as innocent as an eyelash to crack difficult cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a prosperous rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from the man's vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A sharecropper enters his colt in a horse race hoping to win enough money to buy his farm from the owner who has bet on Mark McCain's entry.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas helps his former Army captain, now an undercover federal agent, infiltrate a gang of bank robbers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas finds himself involved in murder when he gallantly steps to the aid of a beautiful woman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An ex-convict is blamed for a brutal crime despite his claims of rehabilitation.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is out for vengeance when Mark is used as a pawn in a bank robbery scheme.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan. Now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tracks an escaped prisoner to a town that turns out to be run by the gunman's brother who is notorious for shooting people in the back.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshall Torrance out of town, Only Lucas can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
